meta.title: Nasc Consulting — Building the Links that Matter
meta.description: Nasc Consulting — Building the Links that Matter. Strategic consulting by Robert Crain in Sun Prairie, Wisconsin. Stakeholder relations, strategy, communications, and public affairs.
meta.og_description: I help organizations build stronger relationships, navigate complexity, and turn strategy into action.

hero.subtitle: I help organizations build stronger relationships, navigate complexity, and turn strategy into action.

about.label: ABOUT
about.heading: Robert Crain
paragraphs: Over the course of my career I've worn a lot of hats — leader, strategist, communicator, advocate. What ties it all together is a genuine curiosity about people and a draw toward work that doesn't fit neatly into one box.

I've helped organizations work through hard problems, build stronger teams, and find clarity when the path forward isn't obvious. Where I've consistently added the most value is at the intersection of organizations and the people they serve.

I'm at my best when I'm working alongside people who are trying to figure something out — bringing whatever is most useful to the table, whether that's experience, a fresh perspective, or just a steady presence in the middle of a complicated moment.
about.quote: "Nasc" is the Irish word for "link" or "connection" — a nod to Irish heritage and a reflection of work that has always been about people and relationships.

items.title: Stakeholder & Community Relations
items.description: Building trust, managing complex relationships, and helping organizations engage effectively with the communities they serve.

items.title: Strategy & Communications
items.description: Developing clear messages, aligning teams, and turning strategic vision into action that resonates at every level.

items.title: Business & Economic Development
items.description: Supporting growth, attracting investment, and navigating the intersection of business and community opportunity.

items.title: Public Affairs & Regulatory Navigation
items.description: Managing public processes, working with government agencies, and communicating effectively with legislators and regulators.

items.title: Private Sector
items.description: Bringing strategic clarity and stakeholder expertise to complex business challenges and growth opportunities.

items.title: Nonprofits & Associations
items.description: Helping mission-driven organizations communicate, engage, and grow their impact in the communities they serve.

items.title: Municipalities & Government
items.description: Supporting public sector clients with community engagement, communications, and policy navigation.

items.title: Hospitality & Tourism
items.description: Drawing on deep industry knowledge and civic leadership to help organizations build stronger community and stakeholder relationships.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.heading: Let's Talk
contact.headline: If you're working through a challenge or just want to connect, I'd love to hear from you.
contact.subtext: No agenda required — just a good conversation about what you're working on and how I might be able to help.
contact.success_message: Thank you for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error_message: Something went wrong. Please email me directly.
